caption: A video call features several participants in separate video windows. One man wears a blue shirt and glasses, another wears a gray shirt and headsets while sitting outdoors under a tree, and a third man wears a blue shirt and a gray baseball cap with headphones. A woman wearing a light-colored top and pink headphones rests her chin on her hand. Legible on-screen name tags include "Jerry Mcluhan", "Norway S Kvernan", "Gezel Balleya", and "Indra T". As the video progresses, the participants remain in their respective positions with minimal movement, though their facial expressions shift slightly. In the final sequence, a new participant appears in a bottom window, showing a woman with gray hair wearing a dark top, sitting in a room with a bookshelf and a lamp in the background. The name tag "Susan Sticky" is visible below her window.
